name: Quilted Decorative Basket Green - Threshold™
description:
Keep your everyday essentials neatly stored and organized with this Quilted Decorative Basket from Threshold™. This rectangular decorative basket features a green quilted fabric construction with allover leafy print for charming style. Designed with attached faux-leather handles for easy portability, this quilted basket features an open top to let you store anything from books to small toys and beyond.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
